abstract: Actionable framework for investing in AI through pick-and-shovel plays, second-order beneficiaries, ETFs, high-risk bets, and skill-building. Use when user asks how to invest in AI, where to allocate capital during the AI gold rush, which assets to buy, how to build AI skills for income, or what non-capital investments yield highest ROI.

source_article.title: How to Invest in AI (capitalize on the gold rush)
source_article.author: @ManiClones
